context.projectOverview: Sprint 4 adds the workflow host plumbing: new TS types (WorkflowArgs, WorkflowRunResult, ResumeCursor, ConformanceReport), ResumeCursorReconstructor (re-derives completed sprints from durable contract status + history), and ArgsPayloadBuilder (marshals config→WorkflowArgs with MissingKnobError/AgentCapError/NonSerializableArgError). Also define WorkflowUnavailableError (used in sprint 6).

principles: See .bober/principles.md. No SDK imports. ESM .js specifiers, import type, no synchronous fs (use node:fs/promises). Tests create real temp dirs (no fs mocks).
notes: EXACT LOCATIONS — PlanSpec type: src/contracts/spec.ts (PlanSpec). SprintContract type + SprintContractSchema: src/contracts/sprint-contract.ts. HistoryEntry type + loadHistory(projectRoot): src/state/history.ts (HistoryEntry at line 44, loadHistory at line 74 returns Promise<HistoryEntry[]>). Contract loaders in src/state/sprint-state.ts: loadContract (line 70), listContracts (line 113), updateContract (line 152), saveContract (line 38). Use listContracts to enumerate all contracts then filter by specId + status in ('passed','completed') for completedSprintNumbers. Reuse src/contracts/index.ts barrel for type imports where available. WorkflowArgs/WorkflowRunResult/ResumeCursor/ConformanceReport shapes are specified verbatim in the architecture Data Model section — copy them exactly; pendingHistory is Array<Omit<HistoryEntry,'timestamp'>>. Worst-case agent count for the cap check = knobs.maxSprints * knobs.maxIterations * evaluatorLenses.length; throw AgentCapError if evaluatorLenses.length>16 OR that product>1000. Keep ArgsPayloadBuilder.build pure (no fs) — accept principles text as input, do NOT read it from disk inside build. Confine to new files under src/orchestrator/workflow/: types.ts, errors.ts, resume-cursor.ts, resume-cursor.test.ts, args-builder.ts, args-builder.test.ts.
